title: Wire pipeline parameters to all notebook activities
description: Connect p_full_load and p_from_date pipeline parameters to the notebook activities in the orchestrator pipeline. Ensure parameter values flow from pipeline → notebook cells. Add conditional logic so bronze copy activities skip when p_full_load=false and external data hasn't changed.
acceptanceCriteria: p_full_load and p_from_date parameters passed to bronze-to-silver notebook activity
p_full_load parameter passed to silver-to-gold notebook activity
Pipeline JSON reflects parameter bindings in activity definitions
notes: Pipeline parameter wiring is JSON config, not code
Fabric passes parameters as notebook base parameters
